name: Hashnote US Yield Coin (USYC)

issuer.name: Hashnote International Ltd (Cayman); acquired by Circle in January 2025

custodian.name: Cumberland (DRW affiliate) prime services; BNY Mellon for underlying T-bill custody

oracle.name: Daily NAV reported by Hashnote as fund administrator

auditor.name: Big Four — fund accountant per Cayman fund structure

regulator.name: Cayman Islands Monetary Authority (CIMA); SEC for US distribution via QIB carve-out

summary: Tokenized money market fund offering on-chain access to short-dated US Treasury repo + T-bill exposure. Originated from Cumberland Labs (DRW Holdings spinout); acquired by Circle in January 2025 to integrate with USDC liquidity infrastructure. By acquisition USYC was the second-largest tokenized money market fund behind BlackRock BUIDL. Notable for being used as on-chain collateral on derivatives platforms (Deribit, FalconX). Strategic significance: Circle's USDC + USYC integration creates closed-loop between stablecoin and yield-bearing equivalent — preview of how stablecoin issuers may bundle yield products.
underlying_asset: Short-dated US Treasury bills + overnight reverse repo collateralized by US Treasuries.
reserve_composition: 100% short-dated UST + tri-party repo; segregated custody at BNY Mellon.
secondary_market: OTC via Hashnote dealers; integrated as collateral on Deribit, FalconX, Cumberland.
oracle_provider: Hashnote daily NAV; Chainlink Proof of Reserve integration in progress (per Circle integration).
redemption_mechanism: T+0 redemption to USDC (post-Circle acquisition) or USD wire; minimum redemption $250K.
upgrade_authority: Hashnote management (now under Circle); subject to Cayman fund prospectus.

timeline.event: Canton Network deployment; first cross-chain institutional MMF
USYC ↔ USDC instant conversion integration completed
